chemistry.reaction_name: Decatungstate-photocatalyzed addition of aldehydes to electron-poor olefins
chemistry.scope_summary: Addition of aldehydes to electron-poor olefins producing γ-keto esters; demonstrated on gram scale (5.5 g/day) under flow conditions

optimization_table.key_findings: Replacing first-generation OLED panels with second-generation light sources improves productivity by almost four times while energy consumption remains nearly constant

figures.flow_path: liquid flows from source through pump into UV transparent tubing coiled around lamp, then to collection vessel
figures.light_source_position: central, with tubing coiled around it
figures.key_information: Photochemical flow reactor setup with UV lamp surrounded by coiled transparent tubing for continuous flow photochemistry
figures.caption: Figure 1 . Schematic of a typical macroflow photochemical reactor (above) and images of the FEP

figures.light_source_position: internal UV lamps within cylindrical reactors
figures.key_information: Three parallel photoreactor setup with internal UV illumination, each reactor equipped with individual power supply and control unit
figures.caption: Figure 2 . Batch and flow reactors used in the comparison of (a) a 400 W medium-pressure Hg lamp batch  | Scheme 1 . Photochemical ring opening and reaction

figures.flow_path: from flask through tubing to reactor R1
figures.key_information: reactor labeled as R1, appears to be a coiled tube reactor connected to a flask via tubing with a pump control system

figures.flow_path: reaction mixture flows through reactor plate under illumination
figures.key_information: photochemical reactor setup with dual light sources (metal halide lamp and 416 nm LED array) positioned above a plate reactor, with O2 input to reaction mixture

translation_logic.batch_limitation: Review paper - no specific batch limitations discussed
translation_logic.flow_advantage: Gram scale production capability (5.5 g/day), improved light utilization, and continuous processing
translation_logic.what_changed: Transition from batch to flow processing with specialized FEP reactor and optimized light sources
translation_logic.what_stayed_same: Photocatalyst (decatungstate), reaction mechanism, and product formation
translation_logic.safety_improvement: Continuous processing reduces handling of photosensitive materials

figure_descriptions: Schematic of typical macroflow photochemical reactor
Flow photocatalytic reactor for γ-keto ester preparation

conflicts: Light source type inconsistency: Pass 3 reports 'Pyrex lamp' but Figure 2 shows '400 W medium-pressure Hg lamp'
notes: This is a review paper focusing on photochemical flow processes. Contains good reactor scheme information and specific example of decatungstate photocatalysis, but lacks comprehensive batch-to-flow comparison data typical of primary research papers.
